On Jetson Orin with 8GB VRAM, models like YOLOv5s, MobileNetv3, and EfficientNet-B0 can run efficiently, allowing for real-time object detection, image classification, and other computer vision tasks. These models are optimized for edge computing and can operate within the 8GB VRAM constraint. Specific examples include YOLOv5s with 640x640 resolution and MobileNetv3 with 224x224 resolution.
